text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rene

Log:
  Fix a crash which happens frequently on i386 due to unaligned memory access
  in its built-in ffmpeg.

  PR:		189317
  Submitted by:	dim, adrian on freebsd-chromium@
  MFH:		2014Q2
